text: Fork sync target for Diego's pi-subagents fork: keep the fork at 0 commits behind upstream/main and X commits ahead with only deliberate TLH/fork deltas. Reconciliation PRs based on the fork's stale main are insufficient because upstream commits remain outside ancestry; future sync work should apply TLH deltas on top of upstream/main (via rebase or fresh upstream-based branch) so behind count returns to 0.
